locations.name: The Knotted Ewe
features: worn wooden bar with thread-pattern carvings
hearth with iron spit
mounted sheep skull above the door — ward charm
creaking floor that Aldric knows every squeak of
objects: collection of mugs — each regular has their own
Aldric's hidden ledger under the bar
exits: back door to Aldric's private quarters

locations.name: Ironhand's Forge
features: open-air forge with stone chimney
tool racks organized with military precision
quenching trough fed by a small stream
samples of ceremony iron on a high shelf — unlabeled
objects: anvil worn smooth from three generations of use
racks of finished tools and repairs
small collection of metal samples in labeled boxes

lighting: natural daylight through the open front

locations.name: Greensward Provisions
features: stone-and-timber building with green shutters
shelves packed floor to ceiling
balance scale on the counter
dried herbs hanging from the rafters

sounds: Hazel's voice carrying from the back

locations.name: Bindstone Chapel
features: small stone chapel with a frayed-thread motif above the door
seven prayer knots on the wall — one for each Loom-Born god
well-worn kneeling stones
alcove where Colm keeps the ceremony texts
objects: candles in iron holders — always lit
Maren's memorial thread pinned to the wall
exits: arched doorway to the village path
side door to the burial ground

sounds: quiet — thick walls muffle the village
lighting: single window casting a beam across the altar
shadows in the corners that feel deliberate

locations.name: Elder's Hall
features: largest building in Thornwick — timber frame with stone foundation
long table with 8 chairs — only 4 regularly used
map of the region on the wall, marked with Bryn's notes
ward-circle anchor point in the floor — the settlement's magical center
objects: Maren's ward maintenance journal — found after her death
exits: side door to Bryn's private office

sounds: the ward-circle humming faintly — only some can hear it
smells: faint ozone from the ward anchor
lighting: the ward anchor glows faintly in darkness

locations.name: Maren's Herb Garden
features: open garden beside a small cottage
raised beds with medicinal herbs
drying racks under a thatched overhang
Maren's old workbench — untouched since her death
objects: small ward-charm hanging over the door
exits: cottage door — locked since Maren's death

locations.name: Thornwick Green
features: open grass square at the village center
ancient oak with thread-charms in its branches
stone well with a carved Weaver's knot
flat stones used for Hawthorn's market stall
objects: seasonal decorations from the last ceremony
Hawthorn's cart when he's in town
worn gathering stones where elders once sat
exits: road south to the wider world
trail north to the Thinning Forest

smells: Hawthorn's cart goods when he's here

locations.name: Greensward Farm
features: largest farm in Thornwick — wheat fields, vegetable gardens, livestock
stone farmhouse with attached barn
the oldest field — closest to the Loom Stone — always produces best
irrigation channels from the stream
exits: field paths toward the Loom Stone
